vocab.meaning: một món kỷ vật gia bảo quý giá
vocab.example: My grandfather gifted me his vintage gold watch, and it has since become a cherished heirloom that I only wear on special occasions.

vocab.meaning: kỷ niệm một cột mốc quan trọng
vocab.example: My parents presented me with a sophisticated timepiece to commemorate a milestone—my graduation from university.

vocab.meaning: ý nghĩa về mặt tình cảm
vocab.example: Although the watch isn't particularly expensive, it holds immense sentimental significance because it was a gift from my best friend.

vocab.meaning: đánh dấu một bước ngoặt cuộc đời/lễ trưởng thành
vocab.example: In my family, receiving a wristwatch for your eighteenth birthday is seen to mark a rite of passage into adulthood.

vocab.meaning: món quà thay cho lời cảm ơn/sự trân trọng
vocab.example: The company gave me a high-end smartwatch as a token of appreciation for my ten years of dedicated service.
